subcodes.first_line: Fresh words have come forth, and utterances long hidden in the recesses of heedlessness have emerged - they proclaim the Word [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حرفهای تازه بمیان آمده گفتهای گفته از جوالهای غفلت بیرون آمده میگویند بیان
subcodes.subjects: @rejection by the people of the Bayan, @corruption; misinterpretation of the Word of God, @praise and encouragement, @fairmindedness; personal justice [insaf], @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
